chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 937 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at Flag-A 2. For orders on CMA No.3364/2022 (Ex./A) 3. For hearing of main case 17-11-2022 Mr. Muhammad Raza Soomro, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Noor Hassan Malik, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Through instant petition, the petitioner seeks directions to the respondents to supply irrigation water to his agricultural land as per share list of Water Course No. 27-R & 28-T Kobri Minor. In response, comments have been filed by respondent No.5 (Assistant Executive Engineer Irrigation, Mirwah Sub-Division) stating that the private respondents are making hindrance in implementation of Government sanctioned share list of Water Course No. 27-T and 28-T Ex: Kobri Minor and the same may be enforced with the help of Police as well as Revenue Department, so that all khatedars, petitioner as well as private respondents will get their due share of water as per law in the current Rabi Season 2022-23 within few days. It has further been stated that the design intensity of Rabi crop is 48% and Kharif crop is 32% and now the petitioner, private respondents as well as all khatedars of Water Course No. 27-T and 28-T Ex: Kobri Minor will irrigate / cultivate their lands on more than design intensity up to 100%. Learned Counsel for the petitioner, being satisfied with the aforementioned comments, seeks disposal of this petition with direction to the Irrigation Department to supply water for irrigation to the land of the petitioner from aforementioned water course as per share list and stern action against the persons creating hindrance in implementation of sanctioned share list of aforesaid water course.

It has further been stated that the design intensity of Rabi crop is 48% and Kharif crop is 32% and now the petitioner, private respondents as well as all khatedars of Water Course No. 27-T and 28-T Ex: Kobri Minor will irrigate / cultivate their lands on more than design intensity up to 100%. Learned Counsel for the petitioner, being satisfied with the aforementioned comments, seeks disposal of this petition with direction to the Irrigation Department to supply water for irrigation to the land of the petitioner from aforementioned water course as per share list and stern action against the persons creating hindrance in implementation of sanctioned share list of aforesaid water course. Order accordingly. Petition stands disposed of in the above terms along with listed application. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
